title: jasminum scandens
intro: Jasminum scandens, also known as star jasmine or climbing jasmine, is a type of evergreen flowering vine native to Australia and Asia. The plant is known for its fragrant white flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Jasminum scandens include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make a relaxing and calming infusion by steeping the flowers in hot water.
